creator: draco@marino.st
text:
Somebody asked about fixing x11-toolkits/py-qt on the FreeBSD ports list.  I had fixed this a few days ago but I forgot to submit a PR on it.  See github link for fix from DragonFly (and NetBSD).

Fix: 

https://github.com/jrmarino/DeltaPorts/commit/7cf2d3f44950fa3929d9d1d9fb3d1fb9dc4edf8a
